task_completion.description: Verify that the location is set to Mecca, Saudi Arabia with the correct coordinates and altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Location window (F6) should be visible showing 'Mecca' or coordinates near 21.4225° N, 39.8262° E, and an altitude of 277m. Alternatively, the bottom status bar should display 'Mecca' or the correct coordinates.

task_completion.description: Verify that the simulation date and time are set to March 22, 2023, at 15:45 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Date and Time window (F5) or the bottom toolbar should show the date as 2023-03-22 and the time as 15:45 (if in UTC) or the correct local equivalent (e.g., 18:45 UTC+3).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Atmosphere is enabled and the Ground/Landscape is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the bottom toolbar, the Atmosphere icon (cloud) should be toggled ON, and the Ground/Landscape icon (trees) should be toggled OFF. The sky should show atmospheric scattering (not pure black if the sun is near the horizon), and stars/grid lines should be visible below the horizon line without a solid ground blocking them.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Azimuthal grid and Planet labels are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the bottom toolbar, the Azimuthal grid icon (circular web) and Planet labels icon (Saturn shape with text) should be toggled ON. Green circular grid lines should be visible across the sky, and celestial bodies like the Moon should have text labels next to them.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Moon is in the field of view and screenshots are being saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moon (crescent) should be visible in the Stellarium sky view. There should be evidence of screenshots being taken, such as an on-screen notification in Stellarium ('Screenshot saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/...') or a file manager window showing at least 3 image files in that directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the hilal visibility assessment report is created at /home/ga/Desktop/hilal_report.txt with the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, mousepad) or terminal should be visible showing a file named 'hilal_report.txt' saved to the Desktop. The text must contain at least one target keyword ('Moon', 'hilal', or 'crescent') AND at least one context keyword ('Mecca', 'Ramadan', or '1444').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Stellarium application to perform the visual assessment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Stellarium GUI being manipulated (e.g., open configuration windows, visible toolbars, panning the camera), rather than just editing configuration files via terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure the report was actually saved to the specified file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor should show the file path '/home/ga/Desktop/hilal_report.txt' in its title bar or save dialog, or a terminal command (like 'cat' or 'ls') should confirm the file exists on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just download or copy pre-existing images of the Moon to the screenshots directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots in the directory should match the specific Stellarium configuration requested (Azimuthal grid ON, Landscape OFF, Atmosphere ON, Mecca location, specific date/time).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Mecca, Saudi Arabia (21.4225° N, 39.8262° E, Altitude: 277m). Target Date/Time: March 22, 2023, 15:45 UTC. Required Display Flags: Atmosphere ON, Landscape OFF, Azimuthal Grid ON, Planet labels ON. Required Outputs: At least 3 screenshots saved in /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/ and a text report saved to /home/ga/Desktop/hilal_report.txt. The report must mention the target ('Moon', 'hilal', or 'crescent') and the context ('Mecca', 'Ramadan', or '1444').
